ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., truck, van, car) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "fleet_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fleet manager responsible for the vehicle */,
  "current_driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the current driver assigned to the vehicle */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was installed with a GPS device */,
  "deactivation_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was deactivated from the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_current_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_fleet_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("fleet_manager_id") REFERENCES fleet_managers ("fleet_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position record */,
  "frame" INTEGER /* Frame or time interval of the position data */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being tracked */,
  "x_c" REAL /* X-coordinate of the center of the vehicle */,
  "y_c" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the center of the vehicle */,
  "x_1" REAL /* X-coordinate of the first corner of the vehicle */,
  "y_1" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the first corner of the vehicle */,
  "x_2" REAL /* X-coordinate of the second corner of the vehicle */,
  "y_2" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the second corner of the vehicle */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the position data (e.g., veh for vehicle) */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the vehicle at the time of position recording */,
  "direction" REAL /* Direction of the vehicle at the time of position recording */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the vehicle at the time of position recording */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the position data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fleet manager, operations staff, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the position data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the position data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number */,
  "license_state" TEXT /* State that issued the driver's license */,
  "license_expiration" TEXT /* Expiration date of the driver's license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleet_managers" (
  "fleet_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet manager */,
  "fleet_manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the fleet manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fleet manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the fleet manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being assigned */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver being assigned to the vehicle */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was assigned to the driver */,
  "unassignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was unassigned from the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_assignments_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_assignments_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
